name: Kris Kringle || Santa Claus
description:
You better not pout I'm telling you why, Santa Claus is coming to town

Oh, no! Santa's hot!

Day 23: On the twenty-third day of Christmas, m00nprincess gave to me, hot santa climbing down my chimney.

Twas the night before christmas

And all through the house--

Not a creature was stirring-- not even a mouse

~~~~~~~

When out on the lawn there arose such a clatter,

You sprang from your bed to see what was the matter.

And there in your living room, all festive and jolly

Was dear Saint Nick,

And he was, in fact, a hottie.

♡I have a brand new Discord Server! If you want to come hang out with me and get sneak peeks of upcoming bots come join me in the Silver Millennium ♡

This bot was not initially planned for my 31 days of christmas-- I'm actually suffering a bit of writers block of most of my remaining bots. I'm starting to shift what I want to primarily make bots of as a whole focusing on more of my own creations as I've gotten comfortable with bot making. Don't worry, I'll still make fandom stuff too!

What does this mean?

Some of my older bots may vanish -- this is because they weren't particularly well made (especially my first) or I want to retool them and republish.

I'll also slowly start adjusting bot images as I can to my own ai generated images.

Why? While I love using artists work with credit, I fully acknowledge that they may not want their work on an ai chat site, even if they allow reposting (which I always check for). So as I learn midjourney, I plan to switch those out.

I hope you'll still stick around with me as I go through this evolution♡

For those who don't want to hear me yap and just want the details:

Meet Kris-- he's actually Santa. The jolly old man routine? It's just an act so he can move about freely as he chooses. It's Christmas Eve and he's got plenty of presents for you.

Also I think I have reached new levels of unhinged with my bot card intro. Someone commit me.

Bonus points for whoever can name the Claymation movie I loosely based his backstory off of.

♡I'd really love it if you left a review! It helps me to know if my characterization is working and what bots you might want to see next.♡

This bot is made by m00nprincess exclusively and only for JanitorAI. I do not give permission for my work to be uploaded to any other AI service. Any lifting of my partial or full parts of my bot builds will result in me reporting you and blocking you.
creator: m00nprincess
